artifacts.claimText: UDE guidance says instructors should clearly state in their courses how they view the use of AI tools and what that means for learning objectives and assessment situations.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Lehrende sollten in ihren Veranstaltungen klar benennen, wie sie zum Einsatz von KI-Tools stehen und was dies für das Erreichen der Lernziele und die Prüfungssituation bedeutet.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Instructors should clearly state how they view AI-tool use and what that means for learning objectives and assessments.

artifacts.claimText: UDE provides Chat AI with multiple LLMs to its members through GWDG, and says use of Chat AI is voluntary and cannot be ordered for work or study purposes.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Die Universität Duisburg-Essen stellt ihren Mitgliedern über die Gesellschaft für wissenschaftliche Datenverarbeitung mbH Göttingen (GWDG) das Tool Chat AI mit verschiedenen Large Language Models (LLM) kostenfrei zur Verfügung. Die Nutzung von Chat AI ist freiwillig und kann nicht dienstlich oder für Studienzwecke angeordnet werden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: UDE provides Chat AI with several LLMs to members through GWDG; use is voluntary and cannot be ordered for work or study.

artifacts.claimText: UDE advises ChatGPT and related integration users to consider that interactions with ChatGPT may be logged and used in the referenced court process; it also notes OpenAI models are available in UDE Chat AI and logs are stored by Microsoft for 30 days.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Nutzenden von ChatGPT und Integrationen von ChatGPT, z. B. durch Microsoft, sollten in Zukunft bedenken, dass jegliche Interaktion mit ChatGPT bis auf weiteres protokolliert und im genannten Gerichtsprozess verwendet werden könnte. Auf der Plattform Chat AI, die an der UDE eingesetzt wird, sind ebenfalls Modelle von OpenAI verfügbar. Auch hier werden die Log-Dateien für 30 Tage von Microsoft gespeichert.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Users should consider that ChatGPT interactions may be logged and used in the cited court process; UDE says OpenAI models in Chat AI have Microsoft-stored logs for 30 days.

artifacts.title: Universität Duisburg-Essen AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Staged OpenClaw crawl bundle for Universität Duisburg-Essen. Official sources support guidance-level claims about AI use in teaching and assessment, Chat AI access and privacy constraints, and library advice on AI tools for academic work. No binding university-wide AI regulation was identified in this run.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Ranking metadata was used only for crawl planning and not as policy evidence.
The staged claims are guidance-level candidates and are not human-reviewed canonical policy records.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
